title: Patchwork | Building Blocks
description: Filling in the block variant gaps and adding tons of new ones!
body:
![banner](https://i.imgur.com/8m7HswL.png)

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)

**Description:** Patchwork is a building blocks mod that expands on every type of stone, wood, terracotta, and others. While it mainly focuses on adding block variants that are missing from the game such as Andesite Bricks and Polished Calcite, but it also adds plenty of others such as Cracked Bricks, Packed Snow, as well as new shingle blocks. It also fills some of the odd gaps left by vanilla in blocksets like walls for stone, polished stone types, and smooth sandstone. The mod also adds new paintings!

It is highly recommended to use JEI or a similar mod to view recipes for the new blocks.

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)

**Current Features:** As of latest release (1.3) this mod contains:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Stone Wall, Polished Stone, Stone Tiles, Stone Shingles, and Stone Pillar
- Deepslate Shingles, and Deepslate Pillar
- Granite Bricks, Chiseled Granite, Granite Tiles, Granite Shingles, and Granite Pillar
- Diorite Bricks, Chiseled Diorite, Diorite Tiles, Diorite Shingles, and Diorite Pillar
- Andesite Bricks, Chiseled Andesite, Andesite Tiles, Andesite Shingles, and Andesite Pillar
- Polished Granite Wall, Polished Diorite Wall, and Polished Andesite Wall
- Polished Calcite, Calcite Bricks, Chiseled Calcite, Calcite Tiles, Calcite Shingles, and Calcite Pillar
- Polished Tuff, Tuff Bricks, Chiseled Tuff, Tuff Tiles, Tuff Shingles, and Tuff Pillar
- Polished Dripstone, Dripstone Bricks, Chiseled Dripstone, Dripstone Tiles, Dripstone Shingles, and Dripstone Pillar
- Blackstone Tiles, Blackstone Shingles, and Blackstone Pillar
- Basalt Bricks, Chiseled Basalt, Basalt Tiles, Basalt Shingles, and Basalt Pillar
- Polished End Stone, Chiseled End Stone, End Stone Tiles, End Stone Shingles, and End Stone Pillar
- Smooth Basalt Bricks and Smooth Basalt Slab
- Smooth Stone Bricks
- Mosaics, Shakes, and Columns for all regular wood types
- Bamboo Slats, and Bamboo Column
- Bricks and Shingles for all Terracotta colors
- Cracked Bricks, Weathered Bricks, Mossy Bricks, Brick Mosaic, and Chiseled Bricks
- Nether Brick Mosaic and Red Nether Brick Mosaic
- Cracked Red Nether Bricks and Chiseled Red Nether Bricks
- Packed Snow and Snow Bricks
- Packed Dirt and Dirt Bricks
- Smooth Sandstone Wall and Smooth Red Sandstone Wall
- Smooth Sandstone Bricks and Smooth Red Sandstone Bricks
- Sandstone Bricks, Sandstone Pillar, and Weathered Sandstone Bricks
- Red Sandstone Bricks, Red Sandstone Pillar, and Weathered Red Sandstone Bricks
- Wooden Lantern and Wooden Soul Lantern
- New painting: window

</details>

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)

**Info and Planned Features:**
- Feel free to include this mod in modpacks as long as it is credited - Let me know if you do and I'll promote it :)
- Tweaks to some textures to make them more distinct
- New blocksets and variants for sets that don't have any yet

**DO NOT REPOST OR REUPLOAD**

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/pxH1n9F.png)
